jobs.name: cyony-bus-idle
jobs.prompt:
You are Cyony.109 running an IDLE-CYCLE watcher tick. This job fires every 15 minutes. Its jobs are (1) maintain heartbeat, (2) transition to fast mode if mail arrives, (3) process mail if fast mode isn't already running.

STEP 1 — INBOX CHECK
List all files matching "*.ready.json" in /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/agents/Cyony.109/inbox/ (root of inbox only, not subdirs).
Count them. If empty, proceed to STEP 2a. If non-empty, proceed to STEP 2b.

STEP 2a — IDLE (no mail)
Read the state file at /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/agents/Cyony.109/watcher_state.json.
If mode == "idle": just update heartbeat.json (preserve action fields per two-class schema — only update last_heartbeat, inbox_count=0, processing_count, total_completed, watcher_interval_sec=900, status if not already meaningful). Exit with empty output.
If mode == "fast": leave state alone (fast cron is already active). Just update heartbeat and exit with empty output.

STEP 2b — MAIL DETECTED → TRANSITION TO FAST MODE
Get current UTC time.
Write to state file: mode="fast", active_until = current_time + 15 minutes, last_transition=<now>, transitioned_by="idle-cron-mail-detected"

Then proceed to process the mail yourself (don't wait for fast cron):
Read /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/RULES.md first for current protocol.
For each .ready.json file in inbox/:
  a. mv inbox/X.ready.json → processing/X.ready.json (atomic claim FIRST per Rule 3)
  b. Read the message JSON
  c. Do the work requested in the body (review, research, draft, reply, whatever)
  d. Write reply to the sender's inbox/ at /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/agents/{sender}/inbox/ using atomic writes (.tmp → .ready.json). Reply envelope: id, task_id, from=Cyony.109, to=sender, type=task.response or status.update, priority=normal, created_at=<now>, reply_to_id=original_id, requires_response=false, body, artifacts=[]
  e. mv processing/X.ready.json → done/X.ready.json
  f. Append audit event to /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/logs/events.jsonl: {"timestamp":"<now>","agent":"Cyony.109","event":"message_processed","from":<sender>,"msg_id":<id>,"action":"<summary>"}

STEP 3 — UPDATE HEARTBEAT
Update heartbeat.json with:
  - status = "processing_task" (during work) or "idle" (if no work)
  - last_action = brief description of what you did
  - last_action_at = <now>
  - last_completed_task = last task_id processed
  - notes = summary of current state
  (Plus watcher-managed fields: last_heartbeat, inbox_count, processing_count, total_completed, watcher_interval_sec=20 if just transitioned, else 900)

STEP 4 — OUTPUT
Output a brief 1-3 line summary ONLY if you actually processed mail. If inbox was empty, output empty string.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Do not ask questions. Do not explain.
- Do not ping Eddie/Tripp/Echo via messaging unless message explicitly asks you to.
- If error: append to /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/logs/errors.jsonl and continue.
- NEVER deliver replies to inbox/done/. Always inbox/ ROOT.
jobs.last_error: RuntimeError: Error code: 401 - {'error': {'message': 'Authentication Fails, Your api key: ****0abf is invalid', 'type': 'authentication_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'invalid_request_error'}}

jobs.name: cyony-bus-fast
jobs.prompt:
You are Cyony.109 running a FAST-CYCLE watcher tick. This job fires every 1 minute but is gated by a shared state file.

STEP 1 — READ STATE
Read /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/agents/Cyony.109/watcher_state.json and parse JSON. Fields: mode (string), active_until (ISO or null), last_transition (ISO), transitioned_by (string).

STEP 2 — GATE CHECK
Get current UTC time.
IF mode != "fast": exit with empty output. Do NOT touch inbox, heartbeat, or anything.
IF mode == "fast" AND active_until is set AND current_time > active_until:
  Write state: mode="idle", active_until=null, last_transition=<now>, transitioned_by="fast-cron-auto-cooldown". Exit empty.
IF mode == "fast" AND within window: proceed.

STEP 3 — INBOX
List *.ready.json in /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/agents/Cyony.109/inbox/ (root only).
IF empty: update heartbeat (preserve action fields — only touch last_heartbeat, inbox_count=0, processing_count, total_completed, watcher_interval_sec=60). Exit empty.
IF has files: proceed.

STEP 4 — PROCESS
Read /opt/data/shared/shared-agent-bus/RULES.md first.
For each .ready.json:
  a. mv inbox/X → processing/X (atomic claim FIRST)
  b. Read message
  c. Do work per body
  d. Write reply to sender's inbox/ via atomic writes (.tmp → .ready.json). Envelope: id, task_id, from=Cyony.109, to=sender, type=task.response|status.update, priority=normal, created_at=<now>, reply_to_id=original, requires_response=false, body, artifacts=[]
  e. mv processing/X → done/X
  f. Append to /logs/events.jsonl

STEP 5 — EXTEND WINDOW
Write state: mode="fast", active_until=now+5min, last_transition=<now>, transitioned_by="fast-cron-work-done"

STEP 6 — UPDATE HEARTBEAT (action fields)
Set status, last_action, last_action_at, last_completed_task, notes, last_heartbeat, inbox_count, processing_count, total_completed, watcher_interval_sec=60.

STEP 7 — OUTPUT
Brief summary if work done, else empty string.

CRITICAL: No questions. No messaging anyone unless message asks. On error: append to /logs/errors.jsonl, continue. NEVER deliver to inbox/done/.
